core_mechanism: topological bulk-defect correspondence in which a nontrivial pairing/order-parameter field (an effective spinless p+ip winding structure) forces protected zero-energy modes to become localized at its point defects (vortices) and one-dimensional domain-wall channels, with those defect-bound modes obeying non-Abelian fusion/braiding rules as they are created, moved, and merged
brief_reason: The abstract engineers a state resembling a spinless p_x+ip_y superconductor that binds zero-energy Majorana modes to vortices and to non-chiral 1D junction wires, and builds circuits to create, manipulate, and fuse those defect-localized modes, which is precisely protected zero-modes emerging from a nontrivial pairing topology with non-Abelian fusion.
